title: The Smith Pilot MIPS is Only $95
content:
Smith just announced a $95 helmet called the Pilot. These entry-level helmets don’t skimp on safety and are equipped with the Mips® Evolve Core Safety System and extended coverage…

The Pilot MTB helmet offers affordability with complete coverage and protection. Offered at $95 with Mips® Evolve Core Safety System, the trail-ready helmet features lightweight in-mold construction with extended rear shell coverage and wrapped edges for increased durability.

Protection

  • Lightweight in-mold construction
  • Mips® Brain Protection System reduces rotational forces caused by angled impacts to the head
  • Complies with U.S. CPSC Safety Standard for bicycle helmets for persons aged 5 and older, as well as CE EN 1078, AS/NZ2063

Fit / Integration

  • Adjustable dial fit system for a customized fit
  • Designed for ultimate integration with Smith performance eyewear for maximum comfort, venting, and storage convenience

Features

  • 13 fixed vents for consistent airflow
  • Performance comfort lining
  • Lightweight, low-bulk single-layer webbing
  • Fixed visor
  • Weight (Size M, Mips®): 13 oz / 370 g

See more at Smith.

The post The Smith Pilot MIPS is Only $95 appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
